title: First battle of Korriban

{{Quote|You are the greatest threat the Sith Empire has ever known, Naga Sadow—and you must be stopped!|Ludo Kressh|<ref name="end" />}}
This '''skirmish''' was fought in [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]] between the respective war [[Fleet/Legends|fleets]] of [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]] and [[Ludo Kressh]]—former rivals for the title of [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]]—high above the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] graveyard [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]]. Some time before this engagement, Sadow had defeated Kressh, who was forced to fake his [[Death/Legends|death]], leaving Sadow unopposed. Sadow then launched the ultimately unsuccessful [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]] against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in an effort to conquer [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. After his defeat in the [[Battle at Primus Goluud]], Sadow returned to the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] with the remains of his battered fleet. Sadow's forces were surprised by Kressh and his full battle force over Korriban. [[Laser/Legends|Laser]] fire ensued between the two sides, and many [[Starship/Legends|ships]] from both factions were destroyed. However, Sadow had a plan. He ordered one of his damaged ships to collide with Kressh's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]]. The strategy was successful, and Kressh was killed, instantly ending the battle with a victory for Sadow.

==Prelude==
{{Quote|You are no longer Dark Lord, Naga Sadow! That title has been stripped from you! I, ''Ludo Kressh'', now hold that title! I am the Dark Lord of the Sith… as I should have been since the death of Marka Ragnos!|Ludo Kressh|<ref name="end" />}}
In [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]],<ref name="NEC" /> [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]] rose to power in the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]]. After dispatching his longtime rival, [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Ludo Kressh]], in the [[Battle of Khar Delba]], Sadow began readying a battle force to launch an attack on the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="flight">[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 5|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 5]]</ref> Around the time of the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet's]] completion, [[Ludo Kressh's flagship]] appeared in the skies over [[Khar Delba]] and was shot down, seemingly [[Death/Legends|killing]] Kressh.<ref name="desperate">[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 1]]</ref> However, little did Sadow know that Kressh had faked his death.<ref name="end" /> With no obstacles in his way, Sadow invaded the Republic and started the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]].<ref name="encounter">[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 3]]</ref> However, Sadow's attempts to take both [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Koros system]] were repelled by the Republic, and Sadow retreated. The Republic and [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] met again in [[Battle at Primus Goluud|battle]] over [[Primus Goluud/Legends|Primus Goluud]], and Sadow was forced to flee back to the Sith Empire in defeat.<ref name="dogs">[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 4]]</ref>

==The battle==
{{Quote|There are other ways to win a battle, Ludo Kressh.|Naga Sadow|<ref name="end" />}}
[[File:LudoDeath.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Ludo Kressh's ship is destroyed.]]
Sadow's forces dropped out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] above the graveyard [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], but the Dark Lord was greeted by someone whom he had never expected to see again: Ludo Kressh. Kressh proclaimed himself the true Dark Lord of the Sith and revealed what had truly happened in the skies over Khar Delba: he had sent an empty decoy [[Starship/Legends|ship]], which was what Sadow had shot down, and in the meantime had gathered his own forces in preparation for an attack on Sadow. Kressh also stated that Sadow was a threat to the well-being of the Sith Empire and told the Dark Lord that he was [[Exile (punishment)/Legends|banished]] from the Sith Empire forever. Sadow refused to back down, and furious [[Laser/Legends|laser]] fire ensued between the two enemy factions. Numerous [[Starfighter combat/Legends|dogfights]] between opposing [[Sith starfighter]]s dotted the area of battle, and [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] were destroyed on both sides by the constant laser fire. However, Sadow had a plan: he ordered one of his doomed and nearly destroyed ships to make a suicide run on Ludo Kressh's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]]. To Kressh's horror, the incoming ship and his flagship met in a fiery collision, killing Kressh and instantly ending the battle. Sadow had finally defeated his old nemesis.<ref name="end" />

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|I cannot even take pleasure in this victory…too many disasters have befallen us this day.|Naga Sadow|<ref name="end" />}}
Several of the ships in Kressh's fleet remained operable but did not continue to fight after Kressh's death. Despite the victory, Sadow was shaken by the losses he had suffered. Immediately after the battle, Sadow and his forces were [[Second battle of Korriban|attacked]] again, this time by Republic forces that had followed him to the Sith Empire looking to seal a victory against the Sith. Led by [[Empress/Legends|Empress]] [[Teta/Legends|Teta]], the ruler of the Koros [[Star system/Legends|system]], Sadow and the Sith were defeated. Sadow was forced to fake his death and flee to the faraway [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].<ref name="end" />

==Behind the scenes==
The First Battle of Korriban was an event that initially appeared in [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire|''Tales of the Jedi: The Fall of the Sith Empire'']], a story arc of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series, written by [[Kevin J. Anderson]] and released in [[1997]]. The battle took place in the arc's fifth and final issue, [[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 5|''End of an Empire'']]. In this appearance, the battle was illustrated by [[Dario Carrasco, Jr.]].<ref name="end" /> The [[2000]] reference book [[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] described the Republic arriving in the middle of the battle and decimating both Sadow and Kressh's forces at once,<ref name="EC">[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']]</ref> in contradiction to its appearance in ''Tales of the Jedi''.<ref name="end" />

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 5|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 5]] {{1st}}
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 1|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 1]] {{1stm}} {{ID|"exiled by his Dark Lord"}}
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 3|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 3]] {{Mo}} {{ID|"quarreled with the reigning Dark Lord"}}
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 4|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 4]] {{Mo}} {{ID|"Naga Sadow was sentenced to die by the reigning Dark Lord"}}
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{C|Mentioned in Codex entry}}
